analysis_basis: manual visual analysis of supplied reference still

framing.composition: single-person medium close-up with a large lower-third biography card
framing.subject_crop: person centered slightly right of frame; head and shoulders remain visible above the card

name_line.content_example: 中川佳希 (yyoshiki41) | バクラク事業 CTO
name_line.placement: inside purple bar, left aligned, vertically centered

body_text.placement: inside white card with generous left padding
body_text.paragraph_structure: one dense paragraph wrapped across multiple lines

name_bar.shape: wide rectangle with right slanted edge impression

body_card.padding: large horizontal padding, moderate vertical padding

visual_style.information_density: high; name/title in purple header and 3-4 lines of profile text in white card
visual_style.text_spacing: tight but readable; body lines have consistent leading

render_directives: Use on one-person close-up self-introduction shots only.
Do not use in split layouts.
Keep the card in the lower third so the face remains visible above it.
Use profile data from a structured JSON source so formal biographies can be replaced later.
Suppress normal punchline captions while this profile card is visible.
